I’m currently on a 46 meters as first mate and I look forward to finding my first captain position now that I feel more than ready. I started working on boats during my summer holiday when I was in high-school and since then I have never stopped. I’ve done 3 years of Regatta at a high level between ages 16 and 19 years old. I had to train every day of the week including contests on weekends. That is why I started working in yachting industry, first on sailing boats and then I moved onto motors yachts. I’m looking for the right person to give me the opportunity to grow in the industry. Ideally I'd like to find a boat between 25-35 meters, I know both the mediterranean and Caribbean very well. My goal it’s to do the Master 3000 GT and be captain on boat above 50 meters one day. Besides this I'm very passionate in airplane, I have done a french license which give me the right to fly everywhere in the world in an airplane less than 550kgs with one passenger. Flying is a very good complement to sailing as everything as to be under control with regards to the checklist, passage plan, forecast, radio and it's very similar to being control of a boat. My next step is the Privet Pilot License.
